items: Added a Light theme. Choose Dark or Light in Settings → Appearance — the interface switches to a warm Catppuccin Latte palette while terminals stay dark.
Agent rows in the sidebar now show how many lines each session has added and removed, so you can gauge the size of a change at a glance.
Selecting an agent that the current Overview folder filter would hide now clears that filter automatically, so the agent you picked stays visible.
Pressing Escape to cancel a session dialog no longer also drops the app out of macOS fullscreen.
